mapper.sql: log_id, user_id, username, role_at_time, operation_type, target_type, target_id, request_ip, user_agent, request_params, result, error_msg, created_at
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from public.operation_logs
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into public.operation_logs (log_id, user_id, username, role_at_time, operation_type, target_type, target_id, request_ip, user_agent, request_params, result, error_msg, created_at) values (#{logId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{roleAtTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{operationType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{targetType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{targetId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{requestIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userAgent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{requestParams,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{result,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{errorMsg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createdAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

insert into public.operation_logs
log_id,
user_id,
username,
role_at_time,
operation_type,
target_type,
target_id,
request_ip,
user_agent,
request_params,
result,
error_msg,
created_at,
#{logId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{roleAtTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{operationType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{targetType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{targetId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{requestIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{userAgent,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{requestParams,jdbcType=OTHER},
#{result,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{errorMsg,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createdAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update public.operation_logs
log_id = #{row.logId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
user_id = #{row.userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
username = #{row.username,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
role_at_time = #{row.roleAtTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
operation_type = #{row.operationType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
target_type = #{row.targetType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
target_id = #{row.targetId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
request_ip = #{row.requestIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
user_agent = #{row.userAgent,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
request_params = #{row.requestParams,jdbcType=OTHER},
result = #{row.result,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
error_msg = #{row.errorMsg,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
created_at = #{row.createdAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},

update public.operation_logs set log_id = #{row.logId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, user_id = #{row.userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, username = #{row.username,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, role_at_time = #{row.roleAtTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, operation_type = #{row.operationType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, target_type = #{row.targetType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, target_id = #{row.targetId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, request_ip = #{row.requestIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, user_agent = #{row.userAgent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, request_params = #{row.requestParams,jdbcType=OTHER}, result = #{row.result,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, error_msg = #{row.errorMsg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, created_at = #{row.createdAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}

update public.operation_logs
user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
username = #{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
role_at_time = #{roleAtTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
operation_type = #{operationType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
target_type = #{targetType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
target_id = #{targetId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
request_ip = #{requestIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
user_agent = #{userAgent,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
request_params = #{requestParams,jdbcType=OTHER},
result = #{result,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
error_msg = #{errorMsg,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
created_at = #{createdAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where log_id = #{logId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update public.operation_logs set user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, username = #{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, role_at_time = #{roleAtTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, operation_type = #{operationType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, target_type = #{targetType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, target_id = #{targetId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, request_ip = #{requestIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, user_agent = #{userAgent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, request_params = #{requestParams,jdbcType=OTHER}, result = #{result,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, error_msg = #{errorMsg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, created_at = #{createdAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where log_id = #{logId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
